title: Maintenance of Escrow Deposit. An LMA shall maintain at all times its
content: 6 escrow deposit in the minimum amount of One Million Five Hundred Thousand Pesos 7 (Php1,500,000.00). In case an additional escrow is required from the licensed agency 8 due to its pending recruitment violation case/s, it shall maintain the escrow deposit of One 9 Million Five Hundred Thousand Pesos (Php1,500,000.00) plus the additional escrow. 10 11 Those with existing licenses shall, within one (1) year from effectivity hereof, increase 12 their escrow deposit to One Million Five Hundred Thousand Pesos (Php1,500,000.00). 13 14 The escrow deposit shall answer for all valid and legal claims arising from contracts of 15 employment and violations of the conditions for the grant and use of the license, including 16 fines imposed by the Department. The escrow shall likewise guarantee compliance with 17 prescribed recruitment procedures, rules and regulations, appropriate terms and 18 conditions of employment, and relevant issuances of the Department. 19 20 The escrow deposit is separate and distinct from the minimum capitalization requirement. 21 22 In case the escrow deposit has been diminished or depleted, the licensed manning 23 agency shall replenish the escrow deposit within thirty (30) calendar days from receipt of 24 the Notice to Replenish Escrow Deposit. Failure to comply with such Notice will result in 25 the suspension of the license of the manning agency until such time the agency has 26 complied with the Notice to Replenish. 27 28
